# Prix — AI-Powered Code Review

## What
Prix is an AI code review tool that automatically fixes bugs, generates implementation plans, and reviews every PR. It understands your codebase architecture to provide actionable engineering guidance.

## Who It's For
- Individual developers (Free plan)
- Professional developers shipping daily (Base plan)
- Engineering teams needing fastest reviews (Pro plan)

## Key Features
- Automatic code fixes ready to merge (not just alerts)
- Implementation plan generation for every PR
- Architecture-aware analysis (understands your codebase structure)
- Security vulnerability detection (OWASP Top 10, secrets, SQL injection, XSS)
- Task breakdown and actionable engineering steps
- 5-minute setup, works with GitHub
- Reviews complete in seconds

## Key Differentiators
- Focus: Code review and fixes vs code generation
- Output: Working code patches and plans vs suggestions
- Security: Built-in vulnerability scanning
- Speed: 80% reduction in review time (2-3 days → under 4 hours)

## Pricing
See /pricing.md for detailed pricing information.
